Dear Joanne,

Tommy asked that I send information to you about
someone who has
requested a showing this weekend.

Harvey Schulweis

He lives in Purchase, and I researched his property
as much as I could.
It is an 11,838 square foot home, built in 1995, on
3.35 acres. At that
time, it sold for $4,056,312.

I believe he was the principal for a firm named Town
and Country Trust,
which is a real estate investment company. In 2003,
they had assets of
500+million.
